languages.text: "После всего произошедшего на Тассере импланты Глейто не в порядке, так что он будет на попечении ваших техножрецов".
"His augmetics have taken quite a hit after everything that went down on Thassera, so I am putting him into the care of your Tech-Priests."
languages.original_text: "После всего произошедшего на Тассере импланты Глейто не в порядке, так что он будет на попечении ваших техножрецов".

traits.locale_text: "Glaito's augmetics have taken a hit after everything that went down on Thassera, so I am putting him into your Tech-Priests' care."
"Glaito's augmetics have taken a hit after everything that went down on Thassera, so I am putting him into your Tech-Priests' care."

languages.text: "Seine Augmentationen haben auf Thassera einiges abgekriegt, deshalb gebe ich ihn in die Obhut Eurer Techpriester."
languages.original_text: "His augmetics have taken quite a hit after everything that went down on Thassera, so I am putting him into the care of your Tech-Priests."

traits.locale_text: "Seine Augmentationen haben auf Thassera einiges abgekriegt, deshalb gebe ich ihn in die Obhut Eurer Techpriester."

languages.text: « Ses augmétiques sont dans un triste état après ce qui s'est passé sur Thassera, c'est pourquoi je l'ai confié aux bons soins de vos technoprêtres. »
languages.original_text: "His augmetics have taken quite a hit after everything that went down on Thassera, so I am putting him into the care of your Tech-Priests."

traits.locale_text: « Ses augmétiques sont dans un triste état après ce qui s'est passé sur Thassera, c'est pourquoi je l'ai confié aux bons soins de vos technoprêtres. »

languages.text: “塔瑟拉发生了那么多事情，它身上的植入物也坏了不少。我把它委托给你的技术神甫照料。”
languages.original_text: "His augmetics have taken quite a hit after everything that went down on Thassera, so I am putting him into the care of your Tech-Priests."

traits.locale_text: “塔瑟拉发生了那么多事情，它身上的植入物也坏了不少。我把它委托给你的技术神甫照料。”

languages.text: «Sus auméticos han sufrido bastante con todo el asunto de Thassera, así que lo dejo al cuidado de sus tecnosacerdotes».
languages.original_text: "His augmetics have taken quite a hit after everything that went down on Thassera, so I am putting him into the care of your Tech-Priests."

traits.locale_text: «Sus auméticos han sufrido bastante con todo el asunto de Thassera, así que lo dejo al cuidado de sus tecnosacerdotes».

languages.text: 「タッセーラでの出来事の後、彼のオーグメティックはかなりの打撃を受けているので、技術司祭たちに預けるつもりです」
languages.original_text: "His augmetics have taken quite a hit after everything that went down on Thassera, so I am putting him into the care of your Tech-Priests."

traits.locale_text: 「タッセーラでの出来事の後、彼のオーグメティックはかなりの打撃を受けているので、技術司祭たちに預けるつもりです」

languages.text: "Thassera'daki hadiselerden sonra ogmetikleri ziyadesiyle hırpalandı. Bu sebeple onu Tekno Rahiplerinizin nezaretine tevdi ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "His augmetics have taken quite a hit after everything that went down on Thassera, so I am putting him into the care of your Tech-Priests."

traits.locale_text: "Thassera'daki hadiselerden sonra ogmetikleri ziyadesiyle hırpalandı. Bu sebeple onu Tekno Rahiplerinizin nezaretine tevdi ediyorum."
